name: @harness/web-admin
description: ISSUE-087 — the separate super-admin management-plane Next.js App-Router app (ADR-001 §7: its own deployment, its own Supabase). Mounts the @harness/web-shared shell with the ADMIN_NAV (Management Plane PERM-fleet.* nodes). This is the only app where cross-deployment / client_slug-scoped views are valid.
